_comment: Fail-closed, DOWN-ONLY suite-honesty baseline. Generated by tools/check_suite_honesty.py --update-baseline. expected_fail_ceiling is the count of KNOWN-failing dimensions per backend; for ALREADY-CALIBRATED dimensions it may only DECREASE (fixing a test lowers it; the guard refuses to raise it via --update-baseline). The ONE sanctioned raise is calibrating PREVIOUSLY-UNCALIBRATED tests (task #55 stdlib frontier): recording a pre-existing silent failure for the first time legitimately widens the ceiling (precedent: e65f56bae raised native 112->140 for the first 28-test stdlib slice). Every fail entry in differential_expectations.json is a debt with an owner (tracking + root_cause + evidence). See the script docstring and tools/suite_honesty/README.md.
